title: Reliable Recipes
description: A lightweight utility for recipe and tag manipulation via simple JSON configuration
body: # Reliable Recipes A powerful, developer-friendly utility designed for manipulating recipes and tags through simple JSON configuration. Reliable Recipes allows modpack creators to effortlessly remove or modify recipes and tags using standard JSON files, without the need for complex scripts (looking at you, KubeJS!). ## Documentation Learn how to use Reliable Recipes, configure your JSON files, and master recipe actions on our wiki! **[Modded Minecraft Wiki](https://moddedmc.wiki/en/project/reliable-recipes/latest/docs/reliable-recipes/features)** ## Features * **Dynamic Recipe Control:** Remove hardcoded recipes or modify ones at runtime. * **Tag Manipulation:** Remove items/blocks from tags via config files. * **No Scripting Required:** Uses standard Minecraft-style JSON syntax for ease of use. * **Cross-mod Compatibility:** Integrates seamlessly with mods like Reliable Remover and Item Obliterator. ## License [![Code license (MIT)](https://img.shields.io/badge/code%20license-MIT-green.svg?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/evanbones/Reliable-Recipes/blob/1.20.1/LICENSE) *** [![discord-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/social/discord-plural_vector.svg)](https://discord.com/invite/JcGRdT6Pbx) [![github-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/social/github-plural_vector.svg)](https://github.com/evanbones/Reliable-Recipes)
